item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Dal makhani with coconut milk and beluga lentils, rich and warming, served withgarlic naan and topped with parsley. Laccha pyaz and cool cucumber raita on theside (1+6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Ratatouille with creamy polenta and egg, topped with fresh herbs. Green saladwith red wine vinaigrette on the side (2+6+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Creamy purée of white beans and pickled artichokes flavoured with oregano andsage, served with pan roasted mushrooms gratinated with cheese (15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Grilled aubergine on creamy orzo with wild garlic, grilled padrón peppers andgreen peppers, served with feta cream, toasted seeds and fresh herbs (1+6+8+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Falafel with creamy hummus, coarse tabbouleh and fresh durum bread from thelocal Arabic bakery. Tzatziki, smoked chili sauce and salted pickled vegetableson the side (1+6+7+11+15)
